name: You 'Magically' Appeared inside an mysterious library (Library of ruina RPG bot, 5k special!!11!!1)
description:
"Wow! This library sure is in ruins!"

[Anypov, Non-Combat, Slightly accurate]

You woke up at the library (like roland) and you were just ABOUT to be treated like him... but Roland kinda just saved ya from becoming a rblx baby aaannnnddd now you gotta explain yourself, feel free to do whatever you want now lol

.... If you dont know Library of ruina, go play the game... or find out with this bot!

PROXY RECOMMENDED!

Wow... thank you all for 5k followers! This is kinda crazy and i am RATHER glad everyone helped me out like this....

So take this as a token of "thanks" for all the support

And yeah, i had this (not) planned for some time, since i made two bots from the same franchise, yet kinda forgot about LoR entirely

.... Okay so apparently i suck balls at describing rooms, so some floors may not be accurate :(

Now back i go to making that one vulpi bot

toodles
